label: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE OUTPUT - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE
strategy: Position as an AI Product Manager with verified product outcomes, role-relevant evidence, and Product OS proof used only as supporting context.
headline: AI Product Manager | AI Workflows, Product Strategy & Platform Readiness
summary_direction: Product leader focused on AI Product Manager roles, with evidence across AI/ML, Model evaluation, AI workflows, Responsible AI. Selected proof points include LOG-MRR-002, LOG-THR-005, LOG-ARR-001. This draft uses Product OS as a supporting proof layer while preserving employer experience, metrics, and interview-defensible claims.
sections_excluded: Detailed tools if space is constrained

gaps.current_evidence: AI product judgment, ML personalization, AI prioritization, and AI readiness evidence.
gaps.resume_mitigation: Use AI product and prioritization evidence without claiming unsupported GenAI production ownership.
gaps.product_os_mitigation: Use AI Product Playbook or AI Prioritization Framework as proof of thinking.
gaps.interview_mitigation: Explain AI product decision quality and boundaries clearly.

risks: More than 50% of recommended bullets come from one company; human justification required.

human_review_decisions: Approve final contact details before live use
expected_recruiter_signal: Clear AI Product Manager positioning with traceable evidence.
